title: Hartenbos Drawwers gee erkenning aan hul atlete
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gallery","html":"Gallery"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSELBAAI NUUS - Hartenbos Drawwers Hardloopklub het onlangs 'n funksie gehou waar hulle erkenning gegee het aan hul atlete wat in 2023 presteer het.","html":"MOSSELBAAI NUUS - Hartenbos Drawwers Hardloopklub het onlangs 'n funksie gehou waar hulle erkenning gegee het aan hul atlete wat in 2023 presteer het."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Die volgende atlete het almal toekennings ontvang:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tydtoetse","html":"Tydtoetse"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Vir 15 of meer tydtoetse afgelê","html":"Vir 15 of meer tydtoetse afgelê"},{"type":"list","items":["Theunis Carstens (30 afgelê);","Janika Yzelle (23);","Ilze Viljoen (19);","JC le Clus (16)."],"ordered":true},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Baan en veld","html":"Baan en veld"},{"type":"list","items":["Mieke Coetzee - beste junior en algehele vroue atleet","Anika Beukes - beste senior vroue atleet","Yolanda van Langelaar - beste vroue atleet 40+","Delmarie Henning - beste vroue atleet 60+","Les Stuart - beste mans atleet 80+ asook algeheel."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Landloop","html":"Landloop"},{"type":"list","items":["Kirsten van Heerden - beste meisie, 8 jaar","Jandri Snyders - beste junior vrou en beste landloop vrou algeheel","Helelen Janse van Rensburg - beste vrou, 40-49 jaar","Delmarie Henning - beste vrou, 60-69 jaar","Ulrich van Hirtum - beste seun, 8 jaar","JC le Clus - beste seun, 9 jaar","Sam Marx - beste man, 40-49 jaar en beste man algeheel."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"FOTOGALERY: Erkenning aan Hartenbos Drawwers atlete","html":"FOTOGALERY: Erkenning aan Hartenbos Drawwers atlete"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Padwedloop 10km","html":"Padwedloop 10km"},{"type":"list","items":["Jandri Snyders - beste junior vrou as ook beste vrou algeheel","Jeandre de Swardt - beste senior vrou","Aletta Elliot - beste vrou, 40 jaar","Alma Snyman - beste vrou, 50 jaar","Monica Kriel - beste vrou, 60 jaar","Bessie Badenhorst - beste vrou, 70 jaar","Niel Kitching - beste senior man asook beste man algeheel","William Elliot - beste man, 40 jaar","Dewald van Breda - beste man, 50 jaar","Dawie Zwiegelaar - beste man, 60 jaar","Gerold Whitaker - beste man, 70 jaar","Les Stuart - beste man, 80 jaar."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Padwedloop 21.1km","html":"Padwedloop 21.1km"},{"type":"list","items":["Elsje Neething - beste senior vrou asook beste vrou algeheel","Annalize van der Westhuysen - beste vrou, 40 jaar","Bronwyn Macdonld - beste vrou, 50 jaar","Christa Crous - beste vrou 60 jaar","Gida de Swardt - beste senior man","Sam Marx - beste man, 40 jaar asook beste man algeheel","Gideon Adriaanse - beste man, 60 jaar","Gerold Whitaker - beste man, 70 jaar."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Padwedloop 42,2km","html":"Padwedloop 42,2km"},{"type":"list","items":["Helena Jonker - beste senior vrou","Rene van den Berg - beste vrou, 40 jaar asook beste vrou algeheel","Kleinjie van Schalkwyk - beste vrou, 50 jaar","Christa Crous - beste vrou, 60 jaar","Gerhard Beeslaar - beste senior man","Sam Marx - beste man, 40 jaar asook beste man algeheel","Dawie Zwiegelaar - beste man, 60 jaar","Johan Lottering - beste man, 70 jaar"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Two Oceans 56km","html":"Two Oceans 56km"},{"type":"list","items":["Dawie Zwiegelaar voltooi sy 35ste wedloop","Rene van den Berg - vinnigste tyd vir 'n vrou","Gerhard Beeslaar - vinnigste tyd vir 'n man"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Comrades","html":"Comrades"},{"type":"list","items":["Gerhard Beeselaar - Springhaas by Comrades","Christo Pienaar - Skillie by Comrades"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Meeste km afgelê in 2023","html":"Meeste km afgelê in 2023"},{"type":"list","items":["Linn Dreyer - vroue atleet","Gerhard Beeslaar - mans atleet"],"ordered":false},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Besonderse prestasies by klub in 2023"},{"type":"list","items":["Alta Beukes,","Alta Gerber,","Petro Nel,","Jeanine Snyders en","Louis Vorster"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Klub persoon vir 2023","html":"Klub persoon vir 2023"},{"type":"list","items":["Petro Nel"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sportman en -vrou vir 2023","html":"Sportman en -vrou vir 2023"},{"type":"list","items":["Sam Marx en","Jandri Snyders."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’","html":"‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’"}]
